seo.title: About Aqua Remodeling LLC
seo.description: Learn about Aqua Remodeling LLC, a South Florida renovation company specializing in remodeling, painting, plumbing and contractor management.

about.title: About Aqua Remodeling
about.description: We are Aqua Remodeling LLC, a company dedicated to renovation specialized in residential and commercial remodeling in South Florida. We put all our effort, dedication and knowledge into making your project a success.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: We help homeowners and business owners transform spaces without the stress of juggling permits, contractors, or construction logistics.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the trusted South Florida remodeling partner that delivers beautiful, compliant projects on time and with exceptional client service.

professionalism.title: Professionalism
professionalism.text: Consistent communication, licensed contractors and reliable project delivery.

quality.title: Quality
quality.text: High-quality finishes and attention to detail on every renovation.

customer_satisfaction.title: Customer satisfaction
customer_satisfaction.text: A bilingual service approach that makes clients feel informed and confident.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Discover how we can help you achieve your remodeling goals.

bathroom_remodeling.title: Bathroom Remodeling
bathroom_remodeling.description: Full bathroom renovations with permit handling and coordinated trades so clients avoid the stress of multiple contractors.

kitchen_remodeling.title: Kitchen Remodeling
kitchen_remodeling.description: Kitchen renovation with a focus on quality, functionality, and architectural compliance for Florida homes.

general_contractor.title: General Contractor
general_contractor.description: End-to-end project management for remote and local renovations, with regular updates and trusted subcontractor coordination.

general_plumbing.title: General Plumbing
general_plumbing.description: Professional plumbing services backed by local permit expertise and smooth municipal approvals.

painting.title: Interior & Exterior Painting
painting.description: Professional painting with fast, clean execution and excellent surface preparation for interior and exterior spaces.

header.title: Our Services
header.subtitle: Browse the renovation services we offer throughout South Florida.

cards.title: General Contractor

cards.title: General Plumbing

cards.title: Painting

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about remodeling, permits, and project management.

items.question: Do you handle permit applications for remodeling projects?
items.answer: Yes. We manage all permit paperwork and coordinate with local jurisdictions so your project stays compliant.

items.question: Can you manage projects when I am not in South Florida?
items.answer: Absolutely. We offer remote project oversight with frequent updates, photos and status reports.

items.question: What types of remodeling services do you offer?
items.answer: We provide bathroom and kitchen remodeling, general contracting, plumbing services, and interior/exterior painting.

items.question: How do you coordinate multiple contractors?
items.answer: Our team schedules and manages each trade, from plumbing and electrical to finishes, so the renovation moves smoothly.
